issue_title: Only reads barcodes after toggling "TryHarder" on or off.
issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**
On both my project and the demo I've been trying to scan a simple EAN barcode. The issue I'm having is that it doesn't read the barcode until I go to the toolbar and enable "Turn on Try-Harder". Afterwards it reads the barcode without an issue. But when I turn "Try-harder" off
test_description_zh: 打开扫描页面，将一个EAN条形码放置在摄像头前，观察条形码是否能被正常识别读取。然后在工具栏中切换'TryHarder'开关（开启再关闭），再次将条形码放置在摄像头前，观察每次切换后条形码的识别情况。
expected_result_zh: 页面加载后，扫描器应能直接识别并读取EAN条形码，无需先切换'TryHarder'开关。切换'TryHarder'开关的开启或关闭不应影响条形码的正常扫描识别功能，条形码在任何状态下都应能被持续正确读取。
